title: Aurora Platform Redesign - Q1 2024 Status Report
author: James Hartwell, Product Manager

sections.heading: Executive Summary
sections.content: The Aurora Platform Redesign project is progressing on schedule. Sprint 15 has been completed with 90% story point velocity. The beta release remains on track for April 15, 2024.

sections.heading: Sprint 15 Results
sections.content: Sprint 15 focused on authentication module completion and API stabilization.

sections.heading: Completed Stories
sections.content: All critical authentication stories (AUTH-451, AUTH-452) and the majority of API stabilization work were completed this sprint.

sections.heading: Risks and Issues
sections.content: One medium-priority risk remains: database query optimization for report generation is still running at 2.8 seconds against the 2-second target.

sections.heading: Next Steps
sections.content: Sprint 16 will focus on performance optimization, advanced filtering features, and beta user onboarding.
